description: Real-paper converter regression suite for implicit Abstract and Introduction recovery.

cases.title: NatCommun 2021 title-shell frontmatter with implicit abstract and introduction
cases.source_path: db/NatCommun-2021-Imaging biological tissue with...pixel compressive holography/NatCommun-2021-Imaging biological tissue with...pixel compressive holography.en.md

cases.title: Nature article with multi-paragraph implicit abstract and no introduction heading

cases.title: Elsevier-style spaced abstract heading should normalize cleanly

must_contain_text: We propose and experimentally realize the concept of frequency-division-multiplexed single-pixel imaging.
